MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-08-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Cause assigned to Dept. 218 for Settlement Conference. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerks: P.Dias/J. Stokes; Reporter: Brenda Fields. Michael S. Rossoff, Esq. appeared for the plaintiff and there being no appearance by the defendant, the matter was ordered off the settlement conference calendar. The request for a jury trial is stricken and the trial date is confirmed.
